**Outcome**

Implemented the admin soak UI polish on branch `codex/admin-ui-polish-strengthen-baseline-checkpoint-d` and opened a normal PR: https://github.com/klintaruvinga-png/smcsmartfib-WebApp/pull/154

The patch is in [admin.tsx](</C:/Users/LEONNA/OneDrive/All Final Softwares/SMC SuperFib Dashboard/smcsmartfib-WebApp/src/routes/admin.tsx>) and [\-admin.test.tsx](</C:/Users/LEONNA/OneDrive/All Final Softwares/SMC SuperFib Dashboard/smcsmartfib-WebApp/src/routes/-admin.test.tsx>). It keeps the 6-card grid intact, adds baseline/checkpoint badges and icons, promotes age/capture context into card headers, hardens print-only `soak-report-print-*` rules, and replaces raw soak-report failures with structured operator-facing status text. I resolved one contract ambiguity by applying the error-message hardening on the existing `soakState.kind === "error"` path rather than changing save-action `panelError` behavior.

**Validation**
